creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The current version of py-graphite-web doesn't work with Django 1.8 (syncdb command fails). 

This is been fixed upstream

https://github.com/graphite-project/graphite-web/commit/e6183c4681d4c64612e7b88015bfaa48b726f19c
https://github.com/graphite-project/graphite-web/commit/75899e347f08f1ea635b90ee018e947a1cf09a47

Best regads,
Daniel
